titleStmt.title: SII 10.548: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 548. (A.R. No. 261 of 1905.) ON A NANDI PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE DARK ROOM (CHĪKAṬI-MIDDI) IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1[2]5[7](?) (Yuva)

summary.p: States that Pōtiraḍḍi Tallayaraḍḍi presented 100 cows and one bull to the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva for the merit of his masters Ambadēvarāja and Lōkināyaka, sons of Chelināyani Komma-Nāyaka, lord of Rēvanūru. A long string of Komma-Nāyaka's birudas is given.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakavarṣamulu 1257
Agunēṭi yuvasaṁvatsara
Āṣāḍha śu 14 gu nāḍu nūlipa
rvvamahōtsavapuṇyakālamappu
ḍu śrīśrīparvvataśirōmaṇi śrīkumā
ragiri śrītripurāṁttakaśrīmanmahādē
varaku svasti samastaguṇagaṇālaṁkāra
Ayyanārjuna haihaya
vaṁśōdbhavaprasādāsāditabētanasihyā
rpitibhaṭaśūra nītivicāra satyahariścaṁ dra śauca
gāṁgēya lakṣaṇalakṣisaṁpūrṇa sarasijabaṁdhu
tēja rūpamanōja harupādabhakta gurupadasēva
ka naralōkaśūdraka birudaṁkarudra rudranakku kā
ra patimeccugaṁḍḍa sāṁpparāyalabdhajayāṁga
nānijēśvara pratāpalaṁkēśvara śrīkārtyavī
ryyāsvayarājyasamuddharaṇa gaṁḍḍarābha
raṇa samarakrīḍakriyāsamattaḥripukulanā
rīghōrākraṁdanavinōda mrigamadāmōdarppi
tārātisarppapraḷayavainatēya guṇakauṁ
ttēya vairisāmaṁttasaṁddōha gaja
ghaṭavighaṭavighaṭanaika paṁcānana sama
raśaḍānana śrīmattenuṁgubhūpāla dakṣiṇabhu
jādaṁḍḍavirōdugaṁḍḍakadanapracaṁḍḍa śenasunā
yaṁkara gaṁḍḍa Ēkāngavīra vīrāvatāra śrīrēva
nūripuravarādhīśvara paramamāhēśvara śubha
ṭasēnāpati taparaviprakhyāta baṁddhujanapāri
jāta śrīkāḷēśvaradēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka pa
rabalasādhaka nāmādipraśastihitu laina
celināyuni kommanāyuniko
ḍukulu Aṁbadēvarājugāriki
ni lōkināyuniṁgārikiṁ buṇyamugā
nu vāribaṁṭu pōtiraḍi tallayaraḍi śrī
tripurāṁtakadēvara Akhaṁḍadīpālaku
Ābōtūnu nūṟu 100 gaṁgu
Āvulanu dhārāpūrvvakamucēsi Icci
timi maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.548 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
